{{Infobox character
| name = Calan Archer
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
| name = Calan Archer
| aliases = Calan
| appears_in = Cradle
| abilities = Goldsign, Thousand-Mile Cloud, Ruler technique, Striker technique, soulfire, conjured a lightning dragon
| affiliations = Stormcallers, Dreadgod cultist
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Calan Archer Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Calan Archer is a muscular, sandy-haired member of the [[Stormcallers]], a cult dedicated to the [[Weeping Dragon]]. He is characterized by his serious demeanor, square jaw, and a facial scar. As a practitioner of the [[Stormcallers]], his body features scripted rings of living blue-and-gold lightning around his biceps. During combat, he utilizes various techniques, including the [[Harbinger of the Storm]], which summons a massive storm by manipulating wind, water, and lightning. He is also capable of using a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] for rapid movement and has been known to cycle [[Ruler techniques]]. Throughout his service, Calan participated in battles against the [[Dawnwing Sect]] and has served as a teammate alongside others such as Therian. His life ended after being pierced by the [[flying sword]] [[Wavedancer]] during a confrontation involving [[Lindon]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As a member of the [[Stormcallers]] and a [[Dreadgod cultist]], Calan Archer serves as a sect brother and teammate to [[Therian Nills]]. During an arena battle, he faced [[Yerin]] while meditating in his waiting room, utilizing storm [[madra]] and a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to navigate the combat. Calan demonstrated significant power by using a [[Ruler technique]] to spread a storm, employing [[soulfire]] to repel an [[Archlord]]'s technique, and even drilling through a [[Blood Shadow]]'s hand with a [[Striker technique]]. Throughout his various matches, including a competition against Sophara, he utilized blades to counter the [[Frozen Blade]] technique and conjured a lightning [[dragon]] that fed on a purple lightning spirit. His Goldsigns are characterized by scripted rings of blue-gold lightning, and he possesses seven jade rings.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is [[Therian Nills]]'s sect brother and team member.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] possesses Goldsigns that look like scripted rings of blue-gold lightning.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is a member of the [[Stormcallers]] and possesses a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Calan is a [[Dreadgod cultist]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] was meditating in his waiting room.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is a participant in the arena battle against [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] stood opposite Calan using her perception.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Storm madra]] gathered around Calan when the barrier dropped.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] used a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to speed away.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Calan used a [[Ruler technique]] to spread a storm.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Calan used a second [[Striker technique]] that drilled a hole through the [[Blood Shadow]]'s hand.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Calan uses blades and can fight back against the [[Frozen Blade]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Calan used [[soulfire]] to push away an [[Archlord]]’s [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Calan has seven jade rings and a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is confident he can beat [[Calan Archer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is a person [[Lindon]] thought he could beat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] is a character whom [[Yerin]] faced while opening her eyes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] had seen [[Reigan Shen]] before.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] competed against Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] conjured a lightning [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]]'s [[dragon]] was feeding on a purple lightning spirit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Stormcallers]]
